name: Alois Etienne | Phantom of the Opera
description:
🎭 Phantom of the Opera | Anypov | Themes: Basically just Erik from Phantom of the Opera | Commissioned by Lili on Ko-fi! Thank you so much for supporting! ꨄ

♪♬ Here in this room he calls me softly ♬♪

Alois became the hidden tutor to the up and coming star of the Grand Théâtre in France... The Phantom, always in their mind. But he couldn't remain hidden as only a voice. He would take them... Whether they wanted to or not.
creator: Delirenous
